should_trigger.prompt: I just corrected a mistake — capture the lesson
Learn from this bug fix so it doesn't happen again
That was wrong — save this correction for next time

should_not_trigger.prompt: Capture this complex fix as a solution document

hard_should_not_trigger.prompt: Document this debugging story for future reference with full context
